1022 CENTRL_ADMSN_CD CENTRL_ADMSN_CD O0110O4A Other: IV Access - Central (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received central IV access days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
